english translation text: Bikhre pare hain lashe, karbala me akeThe bodies are scattered on the plains of KarbalaEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Bikhre pare hain lashe, karbala me ake,Zainab Ujar gayi hai, Karbala me ake
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The bodies are scattered on the plains of Karbala
Bibi Zainab (s.a) has lost all her loved ones on the plains of Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Kaise bhulaye madar Asghar ka tir khanaChup chup ke ro rahi hai Jhoole se sar laga kar
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How can the mother of Ali Asgher (a.s) forget the way he was shot with an arrow,
She is crying silently near the cradle of Ali Asgher (a.s)
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:

english translation text:

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:

urdu transliteration text:
Ab kiya bacha hai zalim sab kuch to mit chukka haiZainab yeh kah rahi thi Khutbe unhe suna kar
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
